title: AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BONIFACIO, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS OCCIDENTAL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3272 / 58 OG No. 23, 4274 (June 4, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3369, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BONIFACIO, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS OCCIDENTAL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
